descriptions.slam: Slam scoring favors raw emotional intensity, memorable imagery, and performance-ready rhythmic structures.
descriptions.pol: Poetry Out Loud rubrics adapted to assess the text's inherent recitation potential and linguistic complexity.
descriptions.academic: Standard academic grading system based on structural coherence, diction quality, thematic depth, and originality.
descriptions.fitness_high: High — poem demonstrates strong metrical precision, rich imagery, and sustained emotional resonance.
descriptions.fitness_medium: Medium — poem shows adequate poetic structure with room to deepen emotional and sonic impact.
descriptions.fitness_low: Low — poem may benefit from greater formal consistency and heightened lexical or imagistic density.
